texto: Policy makers beware: unless you are ready to admit that you are facing an essentially theological problem in the Middle East, do not go about prescribing solutions, for you may actually make matters worse—particularly by creating the false impression that economic, sociological, or political programs can fix what is, in fact, a delusion of faith
explicacao: Citação de Robert Reilly sobre temas ligados a fe. “Policy makers beware: unless you are ready to admit that you are facing an essentially theologica…” articula fe, delusion, islam em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como islam e middle-east.
